description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the 'Filter Opportunities' modal
The 'Filter Opportunities' modal closes, revealing the 'Explore' page
User hovers over survey task cards in the 'Short tasks & surveys' section
User scrolls down the 'Explore' page to view more task opportunities
User hovers over various task cards including 'Diary Study', 'Video Call', and 'Survey' while browsing
